title: MoreFood
description: Adds vanilla-style foods and unique dishes to the game.
body:
# MoreFood

MoreFood is a mod that adds... more food. go figure

It adds a variety of foods.
- Chocolate + a golden varient with better stats
- Cooked carrots and apples
- 3 types of meat skewers that can be obtained depending on the quality of meat you use to craft them.
- Vegetable skewers for all the vegetarians out there.
- Grand roast - a feast in the palm of your hand.
- Golden roast - a better feast in the palm of your hand.
- Salt - used to make the roasts, can be obtained from diorite, andesite, and granite by chance.
- Apple pie - similar to pumpkin pie, but with apples
- Caramel - quick snack, not very saturating though
- Caramel Candy - caramel covering in rich chocolate, now that's a snack
- Caramel Apple - may or may not break your teeth (it wont)
- Chocolate Apple - the mod icon :O

### Will you port to other loaders?
no, but feel free to take a look at the GitHub and do it yourself!

## All Items
All textures by me

![All items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GafaCpLZ/images/a016635a5cce8ff282cc539e9cd139976dcc0752.png)

<details>

<summary>Crafting recipes</summary>


**Apple Pie** - Shapeless - 
2x Apple, 1x Sugar, 1x Wheat

**Caramel** - Smelting -
1x Sugar

**Caramel Apple** - Shapeless -
1x Apple, 1x Caramel

**Chocolate**x3 - Shapeless -
3x Cocoa Beans, 1x Sugar

**Chocolate Apple** - Shapeless -
1x Apple, 1x Chocolate

**Cooked Apple** - Smelting -
1x Apple

**Cooked Carrot** - Smelting / Smoking -
1x Carrot

**Cooked Kelp Fish** - Smelting / Smoking -
1x Kelp Fish

**Cooked Grand Roast** - Smelting / Smoking -
1x Grand Roast

**Golden Chocolate** - Shaped -
8x Gold Nugget, 1x Chocolate
Choclate in the middle surrounded by gold

**Golden Roast** - Shaped -
8x Gold Nugget, 1x Cooked Grand Roast
Roast in the middle surrounded by gold

**Grand Roast** - Shapeless -
1x Beef, 1x Porkchop, 1x Carrot, 1x Salt

**Kelp Fish** - Shapeless -
1x Cod, 1x Salmon, 1x Kelp

**Meat Skewer** - Shapeless
2x Chicken, Mutton, Beef or Porkchop, 1x Stick

**Cooked Meat Skewer** - Smelting / Smoking -
1x Meat Skewer

**Seasoned Meat Skewer** - Shapeless -
1x Cooked Meat Skewer, 1x Salt

**Sandwich** - Shapeless -
1x Cooked Beef, 1x Kelp, 1x Bread

**Veg Skewer** - Shapeless -
1x Carrot, 1x Potato, 1x Stick

**Cooked Veg Skewer** - Smelting / Smoking -
1x Veg Skewer
</details>
